vulnerabilities.description: Content-Security-Policy (CSP) header is missing. CSP helps prevent Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) and data injection attacks by specifying which content sources are allowed.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add a Content-Security-Policy header. Example: Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'

vulnerabilities.description: X-Frame-Options header is missing. Without it, the site can be embedded in an iframe on a malicious page, enabling clickjacking attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add X-Frame-Options header with value DENY or SAMEORIGIN. Example: X-Frame-Options: DENY

vulnerabilities.description: X-XSS-Protection header is missing. While modern browsers have built-in XSS filters, this header provides an extra layer for older browsers.
X-Content-Type-Options header is missing. Without 'nosniff', browsers may MIME-sniff responses, potentially executing malicious content.
HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) header is missing. HSTS ensures browsers always connect via HTTPS, preventing downgrade attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Strict-Transport-Security header. Example: Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains

vulnerabilities.description: Referrer-Policy header is missing. This header controls how much referrer information is sent with requests, protecting user privacy.
Permissions-Policy header is missing. This header controls which browser features (camera, microphone, geolocation) the page can use.
vulnerabilities.fix: Add Permissions-Policy header. Example: Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()

vulnerabilities.description: Server header exposes server software: 'cloudflare'. Attackers can use this to find known vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities.fix: Remove or obfuscate the Server header in your web server configuration.
